div.h3: Comparison of Analytical vs. Numerical Gradients in Autograd Engines
div.p: Implementation Spec for Verifying Backpropagation Chain Rule | {near: top-center}
div.h1: Engineering classes for consistent technical styling
Participant fix: Avoiding 'sql_table' shape inside sequence diagram to prevent compiler panic
using Markdown table for high-fidelity byte layout visualization
div.p: Gradient_Store: Gradient Register File { class: storage_unit label: |md Gradient Register File | Offset | Field | Type | | :--- | :--- | :--- | | 0x00 | a.grad | f64 | | 0x08 | b.grad | f64 | | 0x10 | c.grad | f64 |

g.title: Evaluates relative error with L2 normalization

ul.li: Memory Layout: Gradient_Store aligned to 64-bit boundaries.
Memory Consistency: Writes must complete before Comparator pull.
Epsilon (ε): 1e-8 applied to relative error denominator for numerical stability.

Complexity Analysis:
Analytical: O(N) traversal of the computational graph.
Numerical: O(2 * N) forward passes using centered difference method.

g.title: Evaluates relative error with L2 normalization
